ddls:
CREATE TABLE "test_cases" (
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case */,
  "task_case_description" TEXT /* Description of the task case */,
  "asignee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the asignee responsible for the test case */,
  "test_case_steps" TEXT /* Detailed steps to execute the test case */,
  "expected_result" TEXT /* Expected outcome of the test case */,
  "actual_result" TEXT /* Actual outcome of the test case */,
  "pass_fail_status" TEXT /* Pass/Fail status of the test case */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the test case */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Deadline for the test case completion */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last modification date of the test case */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the test case */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the test case was created */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for categorizing the test case */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_asignee_id FOREIGN KEY ("asignee_id") REFERENCES asignees ("asignee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asignees" (
  "asignee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asignee */,
  "asignee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the asignee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the asignee */,
  "team" INTEGER /* ID of the team the asignee belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the asignee */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title or role of the asignee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date when the asignee was hired */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supervisor of the asignee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asignee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asignees_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES asignees ("asignee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asignees_team FOREIGN KEY ("team") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "department" INTEGER /* ID of the department the team operates under */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager responsible for the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical or virtual location of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team's responsibilities */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the team is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_department FOREIGN KEY ("department") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "head_id" INTEGER /* ID of the head of the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical or virtual location of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department's responsibilities */,
  "establishment_date" TEXT /* Date when the department was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_head_id FOREIGN KEY ("head_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the manager */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Physical or virtual office location of the manager */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the manager started their role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_case_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of a test case */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the test case */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the test case was updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the asignee who updated the test case */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments on the changes made in the version */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the asignee who reviewed the version */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_versions_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_versions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES asignees ("asignee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_case_versions_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES asignees ("asignee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_tracking" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case associated with the issue */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "reported_by" INTEGER /* ID of the asignee who reported the issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the issue (e.g., Open, Closed) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the issue */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Deadline for resolving the issue */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was resolved */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes on how the issue was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_tracking_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_tracking_reported_by FOREIGN KEY ("reported_by") REFERENCES asignees ("asignee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_tracking_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES issue_status ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the issue status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case */,
  "execution_date" TEXT /* Date when the test case was executed */,
  "execution_by" INTEGER /* ID of the asignee who executed the test case */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the test case execution */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the test case execution */,
  "logs" TEXT /* Execution logs for troubleshooting */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test environment setup */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("environment_id") REFERENCES test_environment ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_execution_by FOREIGN KEY ("execution_by") REFERENCES asignees ("asignee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_environment" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test environment setup */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case */,
  "setup_details" TEXT /* Detailed setup for the test environment */,
  "configuration_file" TEXT /* Path to the configuration file for the test environment */,
  "hardware_config" TEXT /* Details of the hardware configuration used */,
  "software_config" TEXT /* Details of the software configuration used */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes on the test environment setup */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_environment_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test report */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_by" INTEGER /* ID of the asignee who generated the report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the test case execution */,
  "detailed_report" TEXT /* Detailed report of the test case execution */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the test report file */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments on the test report */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the asignee who reviewed the report */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_reports_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES asignees ("asignee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_reports_report_by FOREIGN KEY ("report_by") REFERENCES asignees ("asignee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_reports_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role assigned to users */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permissions associated with the role */,
  "allowed_actions" TEXT /* List of specific actions allowed by the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user permission assignment */,
  "asignee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asignee */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission assignment started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission assignment ends */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_asignee_id FOREIGN KEY ("asignee_id") REFERENCES asignees ("asignee_id")
)
